title: dianthus calverti
intro: Dianthus calverti, also known as the fragrant pink pink, is a species of flowering plant in the family Caryophyllaceae, characterized by its fragrant pink flowers and needle-like foliage. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds, skin irritations, and infections. The health benefits of Dianthus calverti include reducing stress and anxiety, promoting relaxation, and improving sleep quality due to its calming effects. Herbal preparations of Dianthus calverti include infusions, teas, and tinctures, which can be consumed internally or applied topically to the skin for therapeutic purposes.
